title: Vanilla Experience - Why not, Mojang?
description: A Vanilla compatible (Forge & Fabric) mod that reenable things and adds some vanilla kind features!
body:
A Vanilla compatible (Forge & Fabric) mod that reenable things and adds some vanilla kind features!
 

Version 0.2.3 still works on 1.16.x.


Currently you can use all your zero tick farms (hey redstone players)
Bamboo, Cactus, Kelp, Sugar Cane, Chorus, Twisting Vines and Weeping Vines
You can sneak on berries and don't get damage, instead you can just put your armor (legging and boots).
You can bone meal Cactus, Sugar Cane and Vines with hand or with a dispenser (hey redstone players)
You can turn dirt into grass with hand or with a dispenser using seed
Mobs can spawn on wither roses again (like was before 1.16)
Totem works from Inventory
You can stack Protection enchantments in armor (like was in 1.14)

You can use Kelp as a Bone Meal (fertilizer)

Slimes doesn't appear in superflat worlds anymore.
You can use your afk fishing farms exactly as 1.15 and before

Flint and steel make mobs burn
You can craft many before uncraftable items, check the recipes:

This mod do a lot of magic in internal Minecraft Code using power of Mixins, if you have any problem, like bugs or crashes, this mod can be the culprit, please report any issues on GitHub or directly in my e-mail minecraftmods@augustoresende.com.

 

Logo by https://www.behance.net/vicentews
